title: Question re Eva Unit 03
wikitext:
[]: Question: re; Eva Unit 03             Quote Post by V » Mon May 07, 2007 9:47 am Um, in episode 18 Fuyutusuki says "it's an Angel, just like we suspected" or something. Did Gendo know it was an Angel in advance, when it went through the cloud and stuff? I've heard some people say that but I don't think so; I mean it could be just "since the EXPLOSION at Matsushiro, we guessed an Angel was involved" ****Further, where exactly are Eva Unit 01 and Eva Unit 03 fighting?

[]: Re: Question: re; Eva Unit 03             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 07, 2007 9:57 am ep 18 wrote: AOBA (OFF): We have a visual of the target at Mt. Nobe . Transferring to main monitor. FUYUTSUKI: As I thought...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon May 07, 2007 10:11 am Does the manga do it differently? Well, so long as they don't directly imply that Gendo knew something more, I won't raise the theory. I know almost nothing about Japan; is there some cultural significance to using this specific mountain?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 07, 2007 10:37 am V wrote: I know almost nothing about Japan; is there some cultural significance to using this specific mountain?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Mon May 07, 2007 2:21 pm V wrote: Does the manga do it differently?

Article: Question re Eva Unit 03
[]: Question: re; Eva Unit 03             Quote Post by V » Mon May 07, 2007 9:47 am Um, in episode 18 Fuyutusuki says "it's an Angel, just like we suspected" or something. Did Gendo know it was an Angel in advance, when it went through the cloud and stuff? I've heard some people say that but I don't think so; I mean it could be just "since the EXPLOSION at Matsushiro, we guessed an Angel was involved" ****Further, where exactly are Eva Unit 01 and Eva Unit 03 fighting?

[]: Re: Question: re; Eva Unit 03             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 07, 2007 9:57 am ep 18 wrote: AOBA (OFF): We have a visual of the target at Mt. Nobe . Transferring to main monitor. FUYUTSUKI: As I thought...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon May 07, 2007 10:11 am Does the manga do it differently? Well, so long as they don't directly imply that Gendo knew something more, I won't raise the theory. I know almost nothing about Japan; is there some cultural significance to using this specific mountain?
